title: Dooby Train Minecarts
description: Turn your minecarts into dooby3D's train! 🚃💨(CEM)
body:
### **Dooby Train Minecarts is a CEM pack which turns your minecarts into dooby3D's train.** 🚃💨

Traverse your world around a mini version of Dooby's kappa train!

![A line of Dooby train minecarts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/154240db3491c128bcf5c1d12540cfa61825247b.jpeg)

Model and textures by me, based on the original concept by SeafoamBoy.

_**As this resouce pack uses Custom Entity Models, a CEM mod such as Optifine or Entity Model Features is required!**_
